sql_array: CREATE TABLE os_info (id Int32, kernel_version String);
INSERT INTO os_info (id, kernel_version) VALUES (1, getOSKernelVersion());
UPDATE os_info SET kernel_version = getOSKernelVersion() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, kernel_version FROM os_info WHERE kernel_version IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS version_count FROM os_info WHERE kernel_version LIKE '5.%';
